title: Official 120K race page
sections_supported: all; official route description; distance; start; GPX link
key_claims: Official route starts in Radovljica, passes Bled, Stol, Golica/Klek, Mojstrana, Gozd Martuljek/Srednji Vrh, finishes in Kranjska Gora.
caveats: High-level route truth, not surface taxonomy.

title: Official Next.js track payload
sections_supported: all; aid points; difficulty; cutoffs; services
key_claims: Payload gives 12 official points, aid services, T2-T4 difficulty, distance 124499 m, gain 5893 m, loss 5572 m.

title: OSM highway/path Overpass extract
key_claims: Nearest-way matching gives road/path classes and available source tags.
caveats: OSM can be stale; bare highway classes are now capped as inference.
